root.name: apply_fly_in_animation_to_references_text
root.description: Evaluates whether the text on the references slide appears with a 'Fly In' animation from the left.

children.name: references_text_animated_with_fly_in_from_left
children.description: Checks that all text on the references slide has 'Fly In' animation from the left.

children.name: no_unnecessary_animations_added
children.description: Checks that no other slides or elements had new animations added.

metadata.task: Apply animation effects: make the text content appear with 'Fly In' animation from the left on the references slide
